run_summary.analysis: Both configurations achieve 100% structural pass rate. The skill+review-loop adds 451s and 65K tokens for the CSO/CDO review cycle. The key differentiator is qualitative: the with-skill version converged from 3.82 to 4.18 combined stakeholder score after one rewrite iteration, fixing specific issues (unverifiable SLA claims, generic Gartner stats, Anglicisms) that structural checks cannot catch.

notes: Review loop converged in 2 iterations (initial + 1 rewrite)
4 propositions rewritten: hybrid-cloud (verifiable SLA), multi-cloud-finops (grounded savings), private-cloud (realistic cost framing), cloud-native-container (energy-specific terminology)
CSO quota_impact scored 5 — highest dimension, driven by deadline-specific messaging (2027 SAP, NIS2 April 2026)
CDO pain_point_accuracy scored 5 — deep energy utility context (IS-U migration, Netzleitstelle, Messstellenbetrieb)
Baseline achieves structural compliance but was not evaluated by stakeholder reviewers
